summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Iteration 20: Location Intelligence + Ticra Wellness Products. All 22 backend API tests passed. All frontend features verified: Location Intelligence with 12 Dutch provinces in Recreatie Step 1, 14 Ticra Wellness products in Recreatie Step 3, and Wellness upgrades in Chalet/Glamping Samenstellen tabs with real product images from ticraoutdoor.com.
passed_tests: GET /api/location/provinces returns 12 Dutch provinces sorted by toerisme_score
All 12 provinces have grondprijs_m2 (min, max, indicatief), recreatie_potentie, toerisme_score, kenmerken
GET /api/location/provinces/gelderland returns detailed info with regelgeving
GET /api/location/provinces/zeeland returns highest toerisme_score (8.8)
GET /api/location/investering-calculator calculates land costs correctly
GET /api/location/grondprijs-vergelijking returns sorted price comparison
GET /api/products?flow=recreatie includes wellness category
14 Ticra wellness products exist (5 hottubs, 5 saunas, 4 outdoor showers)
All wellness products have supplier='Ticra Outdoor'
All wellness products have images from ticraoutdoor.com
Wellness price ranges: Hottubs €2,995-€8,995, Saunas €3,295-€14,395, Showers €695-€3,354
GET /api/chalet/upgrade-options/chalet includes wellness with 8 options
GET /api/chalet/upgrade-options/glamping includes wellness with 7 options
Wellness upgrade options have Ticra Outdoor supplier and images
POST /api/chalet/calculate-with-upgrades correctly adds wellness upgrade costs
All 4 flows still work: Recreatie, Chalet, FEC, Dashboard
Frontend: Location Intelligence section visible in Recreatie Step 1
Frontend: 12 province buttons with prices per m² and potentie indicators
Frontend: Province detail panel shows land price range, toerisme score, kenmerken
Frontend: Wellness category 'Wellness — Ticra Outdoor' in product dropdown
Frontend: 14 wellness product cards with real Ticra product images
Frontend: Ticra Outdoor supplier badges on product cards
Frontend: Chalet Samenstellen tab shows Wellness section with 8 options
Frontend: Glamping Samenstellen tab shows Wellness section with 7 options
Frontend: Wellness upgrade images load from ticraoutdoor.com
Frontend: Selecting wellness upgrade updates pricing dynamically

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all Location Intelligence and Ticra Wellness features working correctly)

seed_data_creation: No seed data created - all data is hardcoded in location_engine.py, chalet_engine.py, and server.py SEED_PRODUCTS
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 20 verified Location Intelligence and Ticra Wellness features. Key findings: 1) Location Intelligence: 12 Dutch provinces with land prices (€15-€120/m²), regulations, and tourism scores (6.0-8.8). Provinces sorted by toerisme_score. Zeeland highest (8.8), Flevoland lowest (6.0). Cheapest land: Groningen (€28/m²), most expensive: Noord-Holland (€70/m²). 2) Ticra Wellness Products: 14 products in Recreatie flow (5 hottubs €2,995-€8,995, 5 saunas €3,295-€14,395, 4 outdoor showers €695-€3,354). All with supplier='Ticra Outdoor' and images from ticraoutdoor.com. 3) Chalet Wellness Upgrades: 8 options for chalets, 7 for glamping. All with real product images. Dynamic pricing works correctly. 4) All 4 flows (Recreatie, Chalet, FEC, Dashboard) still working. 5) Dutch language UI throughout. 6) Brand colors: cream #FDF9ED, olive #244628, green #70C26C, brown #8B5E3C for wellness.
